name: Chinese New Year Festival
description: Celebrate Chinese New Year with traditional performances, food stalls, and cultural activities.

name: Vietnamese Food Festival
description: Experience authentic Vietnamese cuisine with food stalls, cooking demonstrations, and live music.

name: Korean Cultural Workshop
description: Learn traditional Korean arts including calligraphy, paper folding, and traditional music.

name: Indonesian Market Day
description: Discover Indonesian culture through traditional crafts, spices, textiles, and authentic food.

name: Thai Cooking Class
description: Learn to cook authentic Thai dishes with a professional chef in this hands-on cooking class.

name: Japanese Cherry Blossom Festival
description: Celebrate the beauty of cherry blossoms with traditional Japanese performances and tea ceremonies.

name: Filipino Heritage Month Celebration
description: Celebrate Filipino culture with traditional dances, music, and authentic Filipino street food.

name: Indian Holi Festival
description: Join the festival of colors with traditional Holi celebrations, color throwing, and Indian cuisine.

name: Malaysian Food and Culture Fair
description: Experience Malaysian diversity with food from different states, cultural performances, and traditional crafts.

name: Cambodian New Year Festival
description: Celebrate Cambodian New Year with traditional Apsara dancing, temple blessings, and Khmer cuisine.

name: Sri Lankan Cultural Workshop
address: Box Hill Community Centre, Box Hill VIC 3128
description: Learn about Sri Lankan traditions including batik making, traditional drumming, and spice knowledge.
